dataset.name: Execution Layer P2P
dataset.description: Events from the execution layer p2p network. This data is usually useful for 'timing' events, such as when a transaction was seen in the mempool by an instance. Because of this it usually has the same data but from many different instances.

tables.name: mempool_transaction
tables.description: Each row represents a transaction that was seen in the mempool by a sentry client. Sentries can report the same transaction multiple times if it has been long enough since the last report.

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: event_date_time
columns.description: The time when the sentry saw the transaction in the mempool

columns.name: hash
columns.description: The hash of the transaction

columns.name: from
columns.description: The address of the account that sent the transaction

columns.name: to
columns.description: The address of the account that is the transaction recipient

columns.name: nonce
columns.description: The nonce of the sender account at the time of the transaction

columns.name: gas_price
columns.description: The gas price of the transaction in wei

columns.name: gas
columns.description: The maximum gas provided for the transaction execution

columns.name: gas_tip_cap
columns.description: The priority fee (tip) the user has set for the transaction

columns.name: gas_fee_cap
columns.description: The max fee the user has set for the transaction

columns.name: value
columns.description: The value transferred with the transaction in wei

columns.name: type
columns.description: The type of the transaction

columns.name: size
columns.description: The size of the transaction data in bytes

columns.name: call_data_size
columns.description: The size of the call data of the transaction in bytes

columns.name: blob_gas
columns.description: The maximum gas provided for the blob transaction execution

columns.name: blob_gas_fee_cap
columns.description: The max fee the user has set for the transaction

columns.name: blob_hashes
columns.description: The hashes of the blob commitments for blob transactions

columns.name: blob_sidecars_size
columns.description: The total size of the sidecars for blob transactions in bytes

columns.name: blob_sidecars_empty_size
columns.description: The total empty size of the sidecars for blob transactions in bytes

columns.name: meta_client_name
columns.description: Name of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_version
columns.description: Version of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_implementation
columns.description: Implementation of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_os
columns.description: Operating system of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_ip
columns.description: IP address of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_city
columns.description: City of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country
columns.description: Country of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_country_code
columns.description: Country code of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_continent_code
columns.description: Continent code of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_longitude
columns.description: Longitude of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_latitude
columns.description: Latitude of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_autonomous_system_number
columns.description: Autonomous system number of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_client_geo_autonomous_system_organization
columns.description: Autonomous system organization of the client that generated the event

columns.name: meta_network_name
columns.description: Ethereum network name

columns.name: meta_execution_fork_id_hash
columns.description: The hash of the fork ID of the current Ethereum network

columns.name: meta_execution_fork_id_next
columns.description: The fork ID of the next planned Ethereum network upgrade
